actionUnits.condition: Object has a BoxCollider (isTrigger=0) and no Rigidbody. Attached MonoBehaviour (script guid=1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d, component script_fileID=2592690533154406537) is Fire with serialized fields: isOn=false, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, onNeighborsThreshold=2, totalHitTime=5, maxHitInterval=2, neighbors=[] and mainEffectGo=fileID 1849464941111748095. There are no UnityEvents (m_Calls) configured, and Fire exposes no public parameterless methods, so manual Trigger method calls are not available. To change state at runtime, Fire requires: (a) neighbor notification to exceed onNeighborsThreshold to set shouldTurnOn=true, or (b) repeated WaterHit(Vector3) calls to enter/complete the turn-off path. Both require parameterized calls or other scene objects not provided.
